result.reason: The remote clipboard is updated prematurely, leading to unexpected behavior. It should only update when a paste action is initiated towards the remote session or a copy is made from it.
result.approach: Modify the clipboard synchronization logic to prevent automatic remote clipboard updates on local clipboard changes. Instead, remote clipboard updates should be triggered only by explicit paste actions from local to remote, or copy actions from remote.
